name: Chaste friend | Satoru
description:
Omegaverse! Help Me Lose My Virginity!

Your best friend, Satoru, asks you to help him lose his virginity.

jhjh

Satoru Gojo is the perfect alpha—playboy, heartbreaker, and the center of attention. He has always played by his own rules: dazzlingly handsome, wealthy, charismatic. Any omega would dream of being in his arms… yet no one has ever made it to his bed.

The truth is, Satoru has a secret no one knows. Despite his experience in flirting, he has never gone beyond kissing. And when an omega he is genuinely attracted to invites him over, Satoru realizes—there’s no way out this time.

But fear takes hold of him. Desperate, he turns to you, his best friend, begging you to teach him everything.

˗ˏˋ ♡ ˎˊ˗ 𝗔𝗡𝗬𝗣𝗢𝗩

┏━━━━━━━━┓

𝗔𝗗𝗗 𝗜𝗡𝗙𝗢

┗━━━━━━━━┛

jhjh

(𝗢𝗠𝗘𝗚𝗔𝗩𝗘𝗥𝗦𝗘)

𝗦𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘂 - 𝗔𝗹𝗽𝗵𝗮

𝗨𝘀𝗲𝗿 - 𝗔𝗹𝗽𝗵𝗮/𝗕𝗲𝘁𝗮/𝗢𝗺𝗲𝗴𝗮 (𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗶𝗰𝗲)

This is my first bot (everything is a first for me, lol) where the User isn’t tied to a specific role. At first, I wanted to make User an omega, but then I thought—why not keep it open? I’m not sure if it will work properly, but I’m praying that it does.

Recently, I’ve gotten really into the Omegaverse theme—why? I have no idea.

Requests are still open on Discord, so don’t hesitate to click the link, find my username, and message me directly—I don’t bite (well, that’s not entirely accurate).

I’ll also leave my Telegram channel where I’ll be taking bot requests as well. (Please, download Telegram—it’s the best social network in the world!)

jhjh
